title: Otto Koning - Leipzig –Stainless Steel Teaspoons, Tea Spoons with Mirror Polished Finish, Coffee Spoons with Modern and Elegant Design. (12 Pieces)
features: Teaspoons set of 12, excellent value for money.
Elegant and modern design, ideal for both everyday use and special occasions.
Teaspoons made of the finest quality stainless steel with a mirror polish finish that gives a high gloss finish and superior resistance to corrosion.
Length: 15.3cm; 2.5mm thick, ensuring comfortable grip, as well as great resistance and durability.
description: Product Description The 12 piece Leipzig teaspoon set has a modern design that will give a touch of elegance to your table, ideal for special occasions. The set comprises 12 teaspoons, boasting an outstanding finish, magnificent quality, and an ergonomic design which ensures comfort and good grip. The Leipzig teaspoons are made of the highest quality stainless steel with a mirror polished finish, which gives them a high gloss shine as well as making them durable and resistant to corrosion. The modern and elegant design with its curved lines makes this cutlery ideal for use on any occasion. It is a cutlery set that will bring elegance and style to both formal celebrations and everyday dining. The Anna dinner fork set is dishwasher safe . About Otto Koning: Otto Koning is professional in manufacturing stainless steel cutlery, and dedicated to providing you the best quality cutlery to meet your needs and help you to decorate your kitchen and dining table for any occasion in your life. More about Otto Koning Otto Koning is a brand with an identity that relies on the talent of its professionals to create, with high quality materials, the best cutlery to be used on all occasions. Our designers seek to combine design and functionality, knowing that the most important thing is to provide quality cutlery. QUALITY: The materials we use and the way we make them, using the best techniques, ensure the quality of our cutlery and great durability. DESIGN: Our design team analyses the latest trends in cutlery worldwide, looks for inspiration in cities around the world and mixes it with the functionality of the cutlery to create the best option for your table. SERVICE: We are committed to creating a pleasant experience through a fast purchasing process. Wash the cutlery pieces with warm soapy water before first using to wash off any processing residue left from manufacturing. 2. Dry your cutlery pieces immediately with soft cloth after washing and keep them in a dry environment. 3. Be careful with the knife blade when you clean it. 4. Try to prevent your cutlery pieces from rubbing and scratching against each other in washing and storage.
